name: useHash
description: Hook that manages the hash value

parameters.name: initialValue
parameters.description: The initial hash value if no hash exists

source.source: * @param {string} [initialValue] The initial hash value if no hash exists

tokens.name: [initialValue]
tokens.description: The initial hash value if no hash exists

source.source: * @param {UseHashOptions} [options] Configuration options

parameters.name: options.enabled
parameters.description: The enabled state of the hook

source.source: * @param {boolean} [options.enabled] The enabled state of the hook

tokens.name: [options.enabled]
tokens.description: The enabled state of the hook

source.source: * @param {'initial' | 'replace'} [options.mode] The mode of hash setting

parameters.name: options.onChange
parameters.description: Callback function called when hash changes

source.source: * @param {(hash: string) => void} [options.onChange] Callback function called when hash changes

tokens.name: [options.onChange]
tokens.description: Callback function called when hash changes

returns.name: An
returns.description: array containing the hash value and a function to set the hash value

source.source: * @returns {UseHashReturn} An array containing the hash value and a function to set the hash value
